name: Zombie Drift
short_description: Will you beat all levels and become the drift killer? Zombies are everywhere! Unfortunately, you don’t have any weapon. But you do have a car! Now show those zombies who is the boss and show your drifting skills!!!
detailed_description:
CHECK OUT MORE GAMES FROM US




About the Game




Will you beat all levels and become the drift killer? Zombies are everywhere! Unfortunately, you don’t have any weapon. But you do have a car! Now show those zombies who is the boss and show your drifting skills!!!

Features:

- Beautiful graphics
- Car Garage with 9 cars available to choose from.
- Many hand made levels
- Endless drifting and cool zombies
- And many more...
